compiled_state.title: Create plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh — core installer (clone, substitute, npm, sentinel)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
testing_mode: RED

Create plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh (core installer script). chmod +x immediately after creation.

Requirements from story done definition:
- Wrapped in main() function, invoked as last line (partial-download protection)
- git clone --no-single-branch <repo_url> to fetch tickets orphan branch alongside default
- {{PROJECT_NAME}} substitution via sed across all template files; sanitize shell-unsafe chars (spaces, slashes, $, *, ?, [, ], \, ^) — strip/replace with hyphens or exit with actionable error
- npm install after clone; suppress stdout unless exit != 0
- .dso-init-complete sentinel written to project root ONLY after all steps succeed
- Plugin-self-ref compliance: no literal 'plugins/dso' in file content; use _PLUGIN_ROOT derived via BASH_SOURCE

TDD requirement: tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh (from story 1d8e-0a6f) covers this behavior. Tests for S3 behavior must pass GREEN after this task.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: grep -q 'main()' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: grep -q 'main$\|main "$@"\|^main$' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh (main invoked at end)
- Verify: ! grep -q 'plugins/dso' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh (plugin-self-ref gate)
